title: Pasania uvariifolia
intro: Pasania uvariifolia, also known as Uvaria uvariifolia, is a plant species within the family Annonaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Pasania uvariifolia include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made from this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate symptoms associated with fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
taxonomy: Pasania uvariifolia is classified within the family of plant species known as Meliaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly referred to as the mahogany family. This plant is also classified under the genus name Pasania, which is a part of the larger family of plants known as Meliaceae. The classification of Pasania uvariifolia is further broken down into its species level classification, indicating a specific and unique plant species. As a member of the Meliaceae family, Pasania uvariifolia shares characteristics with other species within this family. This classification is based on the plant's physical and genetic characteristics, as well as its evolutionary history.
uses: Pasania uvariifolia is a species of plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. The plant's extracts have been reported to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help in treating wounds and skin infections. In some Asian countries, Pasania uvariifolia is used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its alleged antipyretic and expectorant properties. Additionally, the plant's leaves have been used to treat digestive problems, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Pasania uvariifolia for medicinal purposes.

parts: Pasania uvariifolia is a species of plant that is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia.  The medicinal parts of Pasania uvariifolia are the roots and leaves, which are used to treat various ailments.
